name: Country Sausage Gravy
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sage flavored bulk pork - sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the sausage into a large saucepan and cook over medium-low heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring until transparent.
3. Drain most of the drippings, keeping about 2 tablespoons.
4. Stir in the flour and cook over medium-low heat for about 6 minutes or until the mixture bubbles and turns golden.
5. Gradually stir in the milk. Continue cooking over medium-low heat.
6. Add seasonings (poultry seasoning, ground nutmeg, salt, worcestershire sauce, hot pepper sauce) and cook, stirring until thickened.
7. Serve by slicing biscuits and spooning gravy over them.
